exhibits_walked.name: License Agreement (Self-Operators)
key_findings: Sunday/Christmas closure is a termination event
CFA Culture compliance required — subjective standard
Pandemic/epidemic is a non-curable termination event
No Internet/website presence without CFA approval
Gross Receipts includes delivery/mobile app orders

exhibits_walked.name: License Agreement (Food Service Providers)
exhibits_walked.why_deferred: B-2 is substantially similar to B-1 with additional Food Service Provider requirements. Key operative provisions are the same. B-1 clause walk covers all material terms.
exhibits_walked.what_recovered_elsewhere: All material provisions extracted from B-1 walk and Item 17 chart
exhibits_walked.what_remains_missing: FSP-specific additional requirements for Third Party management, Third Party employee covenants

exhibits_walked.name: State Specific Addenda
key_findings: 3 states require 90-day termination notice (HI, MD, MN)
MN shifts trademark defense cost to CFA

deferred_exhibits.why_deferred: Substantially identical to B-1 except for Food Service Provider-specific requirements. All material operative terms already captured from B-1.
